rows.description: To Mr Robertson, the Architect on acct. of Kidlington School
rows.notes: Selected `gpt-5-mini` for the description as it correctly combined the braced sub-item ('Kidlington School') into a single logical ledger entry. Amounts are in consensus.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Robertson, architect, on account of work for Kidlington School.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Robertson, architect, on account of work for Kidlington School, amounting to £15 0s 0d.

rows.description: To Mr Davenport for Agency & Surveying —
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description from `gemini-flash` is slightly more complete.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Davenport for agency and surveying services.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Davenport for agency and surveying services, amounting to £11 11s 0d.

rows.description: To Mr Cooper. A Bill for Repairs at Yarnton —
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus. Description refined by visual inspection to 'Yarnton' (from `gpt-5-mini`) rather than 'Yarnfon' (`gemini-flash`).
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Cooper for repairs at Yarnton.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Cooper for repairs at Yarnton, amounting to £3 14s 0d.

rows.description: Repairs at the farms at Kidlington Campfield
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus. Description 'Campfield' from `gemini-flash` is visually accurate; `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly read '& Yarnton'.
rows.english_description: Repairs at the farms at Kidlington Campfield.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Repairs at the farms at Kidlington Campfield, amounting to £29 9s 1d.

rows.description: Expences of the Sub-Rector Wm Dawson for a journey to Hastings, to inspect a living —
rows.notes: The pounds amount '3' was confirmed by visual inspection, overriding `gpt-5-mini`'s '2'. Description is a composite for accuracy ('Expences' and 'Wm' from `gemini-flash`).
rows.english_description: Expenses of the Sub-Rector William Dawson for a journey to Hastings to inspect a living.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Expenses of the Sub-Rector William Dawson for a journey to Hastings to inspect a living, amounting to £3 13s 9d.

rows.description: To Mr Paul. The 2d & 3d Stly. Instalments for the Augmentation of Whittenham Vicorage —
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus. Description from `gemini-flash` is visually more accurate ('Stly.', 'Whittenham Vicorage').
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Paul of the second and third yearly instalments for the augmentation of the Whittenham vicarage.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Paul of the second and third yearly instalments for the augmentation of the Whittenham vicarage, amounting to £150 0s 0d.

rows.description: A Bill to Messr Bray & Warren for attending the Subb. &c at Garraways, on the Sale of a living —
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus. Description is a composite; 'Subb. &c' from `gpt-5-mini` and 'Garraways' from `gemini-flash` confirmed by visual inspection.
rows.english_description: Bill to Messrs Bray & Warren for attending the suburb and related matters at Garraway's on the sale of a living.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Bill to Messrs Bray & Warren for attending the suburb and related matters at Garraway's on the sale of a living, amounting to £2 10s 0d.

rows.description: To Groves for Venison on the 30th June 1829
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus. Description from `gpt-5-mini` is visually accurate ('Groves', '30th June 1829'), correcting `gemini-flash`'s 'Groom' and 'Sells Land MR'.
rows.english_description: Payment to Groves for venison purchased for the college on 30 June 1829.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Groves for venison purchased for the college on 30 June 1829, amounting to £6 0s 0d.

rows.description: To Mr Taunton, on acct. of the Windows in Kidlington Chancel. viz. Burfitts, cuttill -12. 6. 0; Curtis. Glazier -35.0.0
rows.notes: `gpt-5-mini` provided the correct structural interpretation by combining the braced multi-line description into a single logical entry with the total amount. The description was refined by visually confirming specific words like 'Burfitts, cuttill' and 'Glazier' from the image.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Taunton on account of glazing and window work for the chancel of Kidlington (including charges for Burfitts and Curtis the glazier).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Taunton on account of glazing and window work for the chancel of Kidlington, amounting to £47 6s 0d.

rows.description: To the Glazier at Islip - Do
rows.notes: Visually, the amount is clearly '3' in the pence column with pounds and shillings empty. `gemini-flash` correctly identified the '3' pence value, but `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly placed it in shillings. The final value format reflects empty pounds/shillings columns.
rows.english_description: Payment to the glazier at Islip for the same window work (ditto previous entry).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the glazier at Islip for the same window work, amounting to £0 0s 3d.

rows.description: To Innes. for a wire Guard for Do
rows.notes: Amount '6 2' confirmed visually in shillings and pence columns, with the pounds column empty. Description 'Innes' from `gemini-flash` is accurate, correcting `gpt-5-mini`'s 'James'.
rows.english_description: Payment to Innes for a wire guard for the same window work (ditto previous entries).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Innes for a wire guard for the same window work, amounting to £0 6s 2d.

rows.description: To the Coroner for his Inquest on Matth. Bond
rows.notes: `gpt-5-mini` is accurate for both the description ('Inquest', 'Matth.') and the amount columns ('3' shillings '2' pence, no pounds). `gemini-flash` incorrectly placed '3' in the pounds column.
rows.english_description: Payment to the coroner for conducting the inquest on Matthew Bond.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the coroner for conducting the inquest on Matthew Bond, amounting to £0 3s 2d.

rows.description: To Mr Thrubb. One yrs. Int.on 150£ his Deposit:

rows.english_description: One year's interest paid to Mr Thrubb on his £150 deposit.
rows.english_description_with_amount: One year's interest paid to Mr Thrubb on his £150 deposit, amounting to £6 0s 0d.
